metadata.description: Agent-native skills for MA2H (the Multi-agent to Human Protocol) — build app-specific notify / ask / task skills wired to your MA2H Hub.

plugins.name: ma2h-skills
plugins.description: Agent-native MA2H toolkit: 'implement' builds a conformant MA2H Hub in your app (any stack); 'build-notify' / 'build-ask' / 'build-task' generate app-specific sender skills. Independent — use only what you need.
